description: Catalogo semirrealista de habilidades para una ruta hacia Data Scientist Junior.

skills.name: Python fundamentals
skills.description: Variables, control flow, functions, modules, virtual environments, and basic scripting.

skills.name: Data analysis with pandas
skills.description: Tabular data cleaning, joins, aggregation, missing values, and exploratory workflows.

skills.name: SQL querying
skills.description: SELECT queries, joins, filters, grouping, and database-backed analysis.

skills.name: Statistics for data science
skills.description: Distributions, sampling, confidence intervals, hypothesis testing, and correlation.

skills.name: Data visualization
skills.description: Charts, dashboards, visual encodings, and communication of analytical findings.

skills.name: Feature engineering
skills.description: Encoding, scaling, feature extraction, leakage control, and train/test preparation.

skills.name: Supervised machine learning
skills.description: Regression, classification, model fitting, metrics, and cross-validation.

skills.name: Unsupervised learning
skills.description: Clustering, dimensionality reduction, anomaly exploration, and segment discovery.

skills.name: Model evaluation and selection
skills.description: Metric choice, validation strategy, bias/variance tradeoffs, and baseline comparison.

skills.name: Experiment tracking and reproducibility
skills.description: Versioned experiments, reproducible notebooks, random seeds, and model documentation.

skills.name: Machine learning deployment basics
skills.description: Packaging a trained model, creating a simple inference service, and documenting inputs/outputs.

skills.name: End-to-end data science project
skills.description: Complete portfolio project from raw data to validated model and deployment-ready explanation.
aliases: proyecto final de ciencia de datos
